title: howellanthus dalesianus
intro: Howellanthus dalesianus, also known as Dales' ironweed, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Howellanthus dalesianus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use.
